title: Cost-utility Analysis of Regorafenib for Patients With Hepatocellular Carcinoma who Progressed on Sorafenib: Evidence From a Lower-Middle-Income Country.
abstract: To analyze the cost-utility of regorafenib as a second-line treatment for patients with hepatocellular carcinoma who had progressed on sorafenib in Vietnam from a perspective of the public third-party payer.
